当前执行目录：/tmp/inspectra-help-nxin.cli-10.0.0-233de4f2c2454081af2d09c1a19fba19
[07:19:55 INF] 

Usage:

    nxin <command> <target> [options]

Command List:

    > help: Show command line help. Write ` nxin help <command> `
    > new: Generate a new solution based on the Nxin startup templates.
    > update: Update all Project to the latest version or specify version.
    > clean: Delete all BIN and OBJ folders in current folder.
    > add-business: Automatically generate runnable entire business code,including database table.
    > rm-business: Automatically remove entire business code.
    > migration: Automatically generate EF Migration.
    > mdef: Automatically generate EF Migration and update database
    > md: Automatically create table by aggregateroot name.
    > add: Generate new modules based on the Nxin startup templates and add to sulotion file
    > version: Show version info
    > pack: Batch pack your nuget project.
    > switch: Changes all NuGet package references to local project references for all the .csproj files in the specified folder (and all its subfolders with any deep)

To get a detailed help for a command:

    nxin help <command>

current version is 10.0.0, the lastest Version is 10.0.0

nxin.cli support net6、net7、net8

support net10 lastest version：10.0.0
support net9 lastest version：9.0.0
support net8 lastest version：8.1.7
support net7 lastest version：7.0.4
support net6 lastest version：6.0.4

you can use one of the following command to switch version:

1. `dotnet tool update nxin.cli --global --version 10.0.0`
2. `dotnet tool uninstall -g Nxin.Cli && dotnet tool install nxin.cli --global --version 10.0.0`

commands.payload:
当前执行目录：/tmp/inspectra-help-nxin.cli-10.0.0-233de4f2c2454081af2d09c1a19fba19
[07:19:55 INF] 

Usage:

    nxin <command> <target> [options]

Command List:

    > help: Show command line help. Write ` nxin help <command> `
    > new: Generate a new solution based on the Nxin startup templates.
    > update: Update all Project to the latest version or specify version.
    > clean: Delete all BIN and OBJ folders in current folder.
    > add-business: Automatically generate runnable entire business code,including database table.
    > rm-business: Automatically remove entire business code.
    > migration: Automatically generate EF Migration.
    > mdef: Automatically generate EF Migration and update database
    > md: Automatically create table by aggregateroot name.
    > add: Generate new modules based on the Nxin startup templates and add to sulotion file
    > version: Show version info
    > pack: Batch pack your nuget project.
    > switch: Changes all NuGet package references to local project references for all the .csproj files in the specified folder (and all its subfolders with any deep)

To get a detailed help for a command:

    nxin help <command>

current version is 10.0.0, the lastest Version is 10.0.0

nxin.cli support net6、net7、net8

support net10 lastest version：10.0.0
support net9 lastest version：9.0.0
support net8 lastest version：8.1.7
support net7 lastest version：7.0.4
support net6 lastest version：6.0.4

you can use one of the following command to switch version:

1. `dotnet tool update nxin.cli --global --version 10.0.0`
2. `dotnet tool uninstall -g Nxin.Cli && dotnet tool install nxin.cli --global --version 10.0.0`

result.stdout:
当前执行目录：/tmp/inspectra-help-nxin.cli-10.0.0-233de4f2c2454081af2d09c1a19fba19
[07:20:01 WRN] Project name is missing!


Usage:

  nxin new <project-name> [options]

Options:

-t|--template <template-name>               (default: app, support worker,job,console)
-o|--output-folder <output-folder>          (default: current folder)
-csf|--create-solution-folder               (default: true)
-md|--migration-db                          (default: sugar, support ef)
-om|--object-mapper                         (default: mapster, support automapper)
-cs|--connection-string <connection-string> (your database connection string)
-dbms <database-management-system>          (default: mysql, support SQLServer,PostgreSQL,SQLite,Oracle)

Examples:

  nxin new Acme.BookStore
  nxin new Acme.BookStore -o d:\my-project
  nxin new Acme.BookStore -om automapper
  nxin new Acme.BookStore -t worker
  nxin new Acme.BookStore -csf false
  nxin new Acme.BookStore -md ef
  nxin new Acme.BookStore -dbms sqlite
  nxin new Acme.BookStore --connection-string "Server=myServerName\myInstanceName;Database=myDatabase;User Id=myUsername;Password=myPassword"

[07:19:58 WRN] AggregateRootName is missing!


'add-business' command is used to auto add related code to the current projects by aggregate info
It should be used in containing specify template for project,aggregateroot-name must equal aggregateroot file name

Usage:
  nxin add-business <aggregateroot-name> [options] 

Options:
  --db-context           (default to find DbConext from work directory)

Examples:

  nxin add-business AssetProportionSetting
  nxin add-business AssetProportionSetting --skip-build
  nxin add-business AssetProportionSetting   --db-context CostPigContext
